textByHash.7d77d9df0bc9433caeb5249b22e6b37c376b3da0: Never, my lord. I also hoped that access to Kourend would have further uses, but I fear the Council is done.
textByHash.b6bfe985ac75a60e6e0b5d348698fb327a6152e4: It will be done, my lord.
textByHash.8ba1aa66c32283e8763faee296613149e0d3cccb: Go? No I don't think so.
textByHash.7028ccd26f32b0d20e8ccf54d3e98734ea940d30: You have heard too much. You have seen too much. You won't be going anywhere.
textByHash.77746d04e8adb09fb96517f655a46632fbce229d: Really? You think this is the part where I tell you everything?
textByHash.4511436a0a4440a08eba0be7e2f605ca71441b6e: No, no, no. This is the part where you die.
textByHash.5ca71e912daf91e654de93b084774cbeb7ecbf4a: Really now? You actually thought you could defeat me?
